description: Component for monitoring a NATS JetStream consumer for new messages.

consumer_name.label: Consumer Name
consumer_name.description: Durable JetStream consumer name. Must be pre-created on the server.

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when messages are detected

subject_filter.label: Subject Filter
subject_filter.description: Optional subject filter to scope which messages are processed

max_messages_per_poll.label: Max Messages Per Poll
max_messages_per_poll.description: Maximum number of messages to fetch per evaluation

fetch_timeout_seconds.label: Fetch Timeout Seconds
fetch_timeout_seconds.description: Seconds to wait for messages during each fetch call

credentials_env_var.label: Credentials Env Var
credentials_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the path to a NATS .creds file

jwt_env_var.label: Jwt Env Var
jwt_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing a NATS JWT token

nkey_env_var.label: Nkey Env Var
nkey_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing a NATS NKey seed

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client.
